concept_logline: Easter chaos gets a cold brew calm-down — your morning ritual, upgraded.

scenes.visual: Easter egg SVG cracks from center — coffee can silhouette bursts out with spring-pop overshoot; background coffee dark (#2C1A0E); egg shards scatter outward with ease-out physics
scenes.audio_cue: Crisp pop SFX at frame 0; coffee shop ambience fades in

scenes.visual: Full cold brew can reveal — staticFile('coffee_can.png') centered on cold blue (#BFD9E8) background; Easter ribbon SVG draws on around can via path animation; sparkle bursts pop around can; scene color shifts dark-to-cold-blue over first 1.5s

animation.can_animation: scale 0.6 to 1.0 with spring overshoot, then subtle float loop
animation.ribbon_draw: SVG path draw-on left to right, frames 90-150
animation.sparkles: burst from can center at frame 150, ease-out scatter
animation.text_motion: per-word slide-up from below at frame 160

scenes.visual: Split-screen: left panel — chaotic hot coffee cup spilling, desaturated grey, tired flat character with drooping eyes; right panel — cold brew can with alert character, amber (#F5A623) radial glow; right panel expands to full screen by frame 300

animation.left_panel: desaturated, shaking steam SVG, tired character drooping eyes
animation.right_panel: full color, amber radial glow pulse, character with sparkle eyes
animation.full_expand: right panel slides to fill screen at frame 290, left exits off-screen
animation.text_motion: letter-by-letter reveal with amber color flash at frame 310

scenes.brand_voice_note: Positive framing — show the upgrade, not the failure. Right panel wins the frame.

scenes.visual: Off-white (#F9F5F0) background flash; coffee can staticFile('coffee_can.png') spring-slides to center from right; small Easter egg SVG drops and bounces beside can; bold amber CTA text animates in word-by-word below product; brand logo fades in at top center

animation.can_entrance: slide from right with spring-settle, frames 365-390
animation.egg_drop: drop from top with bounce at frame 385

remotion_config.font: Poppins Bold for overlays, Poppins Regular for subtext — load via @remotion/google-fonts
remotion_config.animation_notes: All motion via useCurrentFrame() + interpolate(). Use spring() for pop/bounce. No external CSS keyframes.

audio.background_music: Upbeat lo-fi spring track — fade in at frame 0, fade out at frame 420

creative_brief.hook_strategy: Pattern interrupt — Easter egg cracks open to reveal cold brew can. Subverts holiday expectations in the first 2 seconds to stop the scroll.
creative_brief.emotional_arc: Chaos → Calm → Energy → Action. Easter morning usually means stress; cold brew is the upgrade that makes it smooth.
creative_brief.visual_style: Kurzgesagt-inspired flat SVG motion — snappy spring animations, brand color palette, no live footage or external CSS
creative_brief.cta_rationale: 'Grab Yours' taps into Easter gifting behavior from research data; direct imperative verb, under 4 words per brand_identity.md CTA rules

platform_adaptations.instagram_reels: 9:16 vertical primary format; text in center safe zone; CTA with swipe-up intent
platform_adaptations.youtube_shorts: Same 9:16 composition; CTA swapped to 'Try It Today' for YouTube search/discovery context
platform_adaptations.threads: Export 1:1 square crop variant (1080x1080); used as teaser clip with link to full Reel

research_alignment.key_insight: Easter shoppers prioritize indulgence; cold brew positioned as the smooth, premium morning ritual vs. hot coffee chaos
trend_hooks: Easter F&B gifting — 69% of consumers celebrate
Smooth taste and low acidity as purchase drivers
Scarcity/seasonal framing drives Gen Z FOMO
